text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for this year's summer camp! I got plenty
of sleep this time, so I'm raring to go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just wait for me, Queen Elizabeth II Cup! Now that
I've gotten stronger, I'll send my foes spinning
with my Princess☆Hell Wheel!
